# BuildYourProjects
> End-to-end project development & hands-on tech courses for engineering students.

https://www.buildyourprojects.xyz

## Courses

### Python-to-Placement: The 30-Day Logic Sprint
- **Price:** ₹899
- **Description:** Python for placement coding rounds (TCS NQT, Infosys, Zoho). 7-12 hours of training with daily logic challenges.
- **Link:** https://www.buildyourprojects.xyz/courses

### AI-Powered Developer: 10x Productivity with Advanced Prompting
- **Price:** ₹499
- **Description:** Prompt engineering with GitHub Copilot and Cursor. Code and debug 10x faster. 7-12 hours.
- **Link:** https://www.buildyourprojects.xyz/courses

### Build-a-Bot: Practical Generative AI for Engineers
- **Price:** ₹999
- **Description:** Build AI agents, LLM-powered PDF readers, and autonomous tools. No intimidating math. 7-12 hours.
- **Link:** https://www.buildyourprojects.xyz/courses

### Smart-Systems Masterclass: From ESP32 to Robotics
- **Price:** ₹1,299
- **Description:** ESP32 sensor integration, BLE/Wi-Fi, ROS 2 fundamentals for autonomous mobile robots. 7-12 hours.
- **Link:** https://www.buildyourprojects.xyz/courses

## Projects (Ready-to-Deploy)
All projects come with 100% working prototype, IEEE-format documentation, and viva support.

- **AI Vision Autonomous Rover** — ₹16,500 (Raspberry Pi, OpenCV, deep learning)
- **IoT Battery Manager (ESP32)** — ₹16,500 (Cloud dashboard, voltage/current monitoring)
- **Real-Time Data Dashboard** — ₹18,000 (WebSockets, sensor data visualization)
- **Smart Railway Dustbin (IoT)** — ₹15,800 (ESP32, Flask, waste segregation)
- **Radar Surveillance Rover** — ₹15,200 (360° radar, manual/auto control)
- **ML Battery Fault Detector** — Contact for quote (TinyML, ESP32)
- **AI Waste Sorter Robot** — Contact for quote (CNN, conveyor belt)
- **Autonomous Person-Following Drone** — Contact for quote (AI tracking, PID)
- **Agri-Tech IoT Rover** — ₹17,500 (NPK sensors, soil analysis ML)
- **AI Robotic Arm (Pick & Place)** — Contact for quote (4-DOF, OpenCV)
- **Lidar Autonomous Wheelchair** — Contact for quote (SLAM, assistive tech)
- **Lidar Surveillance Bot** — Contact for quote (2D/3D mapping, patrolling)
- **Age-GAN Image Generator** — Contact for quote (GANs, deep learning)

## Services
- Prototyping (rapid hardware from concept to working model)
- IEEE-format documentation and schematics
- ML/AI model deployment on edge devices
- Viva support and mock vivas
- Hardware assembly and circuit design
- IoT cloud dashboard setup
